element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Damage penalty mechanic; friendly fire consequences introduced immediately
Larger, multi-hit targets requiring sustained fire
Mobile aerial threats; increased positioning challenge
Area-of-effect tool; teaches strategic targeting beyond basic fire
Resource management; ammo conservation vs. aggression balance
Damage recovery mechanic; stage completion rewards

element_introduction_order.element: Special machine gun power-up (10-second unlimited ammo)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Temporary invulnerability-lite state; risk/reward for aggressive play
High-risk mechanic; damages friendlies and enemies equally
Advanced defensive play; visible incoming fire can be shot down

element_introduction_order.element: Enemy ranged attacks (gunfire, grenades, mortars, bazookas, missiles)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Threat escalation; teaches dodging and damage awareness
Narrative reward; stage completion gates new locations

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Rail-shooter momentum with breathing room between enemy waves; continuous horizontal scroll creates push-forward pressure; stage counter (kill quota) provides persistent tension target

difficulty_curve.early_game: Jungle stage introduces basic gunfire and hostage mechanics; manageable enemy density with clear kill quota counter
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Prison Camp and intermediate stages escalate vehicle targets and enemy projectile variety; grenade and power-up management becomes critical
difficulty_curve.late_game: Final stages combine all threat types; dense enemy waves with sustained fire requirements; hostage rescue quota impacts ending quality
notable_spikes: Transition from single soldiers to vehicle targets (increased health/firepower)
Introduction of simultaneous air and ground threats (helicopters + armored transports)
High-density enemy waves with multiple hostage placement risks

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Hostile territory traversal with civilian integration
notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage presents a military environment (Jungle, Prison Camp, Airport, etc.) where enemy combatants are mixed with non-combatant hostages. Player must maintain targeting precision while managing friendly-fire damage penalty.
Stage completion triggers interrogation sequences that unlock subsequent mission locations. Kill quota completion and hostage rescue count affect narrative outcomes and final score bonuses.
Limited ammunition and grenades require shooting environmental objects for replenishment. Players must balance aggression with conservation, and choose between ammunition and dynamite pickups.
Later stages introduce mobile targets (trucks, boats, helicopters, armored transports) requiring sustained fire and positional awareness beyond basic ground-soldier encounters.
